DICETHESPIRE-THE_INVENTOR.aromaPrinciple: I hope The Architech will let me study under him.

DICETHESPIRE-THE_INVENTOR.cardsModifierD: The Inventor's cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
DICETHESPIRE-THE_INVENTOR.description:
A former contestent with a knack for creating powerful tools.
Scrap her cards to create powerful gadgets.
DICETHESPIRE-THE_INVENTOR.eventDeathPrev: I can't learn anything if I'm dead.
DICETHESPIRE-THE_INVENTOR.goldMonologue: I could buy a History Course with this much money.
DICETHESPIRE-THE_INVENTOR.title: The Inventor
